channel.title: Song on rirsc
channel.description: Recent content in Song on rirsc

item.title: 25week16 - Brain texts. Mapping universe. A golden hat
item.description:
This week I finally grabbed a sunny coffee at Cafe Finovo, located at the entrance of a little cemetery. It was sunny and the cherry blossom bloomed, so the experience forced us to grab a second one to elongate the nice time.

˙

I am not discovering anything new here, but the newsletter from Anne-Laure Le Cunff↗ has quite a collection of interesting notes about the brain and human behavior.

˙

Hypertext TV↗ is a ‘real’ TV channel where you can zap around media in the forms of games, music, poetry and more by Ky Decker↗. You can make your boss dance↗ or, you know, wonder about your entire existence and read about the fourth dimension↗. Go check the rest.

˙

The Women Who Mapped the Universe and Still Couldn’t Get Any Respect↗.

˙

Lately I am reading a bit about Sky Atlas and how humans have approached stargazing. I discovered this golden hat↗, which apparently was used as a lunar and solar calendar. Imagining that being worn makes me wonder if its adding serenity or funny to the wizard. Anyhow, its kept at the Neues Museum; I will go see it one of these days.

˙

Listening: Stander - Collapsing because I watched them this weekend:
